spec.name: A Massive Sand Dune
spec.description: You stand now on a massive sand dune on the southern side of the pyramid. At the foot of the sand dune to the north you see a small hole where the stones of the pyramid have collapsed. Not far to the south is a massive roiling sandstorm; the wind from the storm howls and bites at your face even here.

north.description: You see a small hole leading back into the pyramid.

south.description: You see only a wall of whirling, blowing, dry sand.

extra_descs.description: The sand is very white, and very sandy. There sure is a lot of it.
